allow: PowerShell($user = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('PATH','User'\); $machine = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('PATH','Machine'\); Write-Output "USER PATH:"; \($user -split ';'\) | Where-Object { $_ -match 'node|Node' }; Write-Output "---"; Write-Output "MACHINE PATH:"; \($machine -split ';'\) | Where-Object { $_ -match 'node|Node' })
